$fd_3cd7bf079c855e$ .equals("tybYes") ) " disCondition="($产品类别$ .equals("mmjb") && $磨煤机备件是否完整发货$ .equals("mmjbYes") ) || ($产品类别$ .equals("tyb") && $通用备件是否完整发货$ .equals("tybYes") ) " endNodeId="N21" endPosition="4" id="L25" name="完整发货" points="640,1040;720,1040" priority="0" startNodeId="N30" startPosition="2"/> <line condition="($fd_seal_type$ .equals("mmjb") && $fd_3cd7befcfac6be$ .equals("mmjbNo") ) || ($fd_seal_type$ .equals("tyb") && $fd_3cd7bf079c855e$ .equals("tybNo") ) || ( $fd_seal_type$ .equals("MMJ") ) || ( $fd_seal_type$ .equals("TY") ) || ( $fd_seal_type$ .equals("TZ") ) || ( $fd_seal_type$ .equals("JG") ) || ( $fd_seal_type$ .equals("QT") ) || ( $fd_seal_type$ .equals("fw") )" disCondition="($产品类别$ .equals("mmjb") && $磨煤机备件是否完整发货$ .equals("mmjbNo") ) || ($产品类别$ .equals("tyb") && $通用备件是否完整发货$ .equals("tybNo") ) || ( $产品类别$ .equals("MMJ") ) || ( $产品类别$ .equals("TY") ) || ( $产品类别$ .equals("TZ") ) || ( $产品类别$ .equals("JG") ) || ( $产品类别$ .equals("QT") ) || ( $产品类别$ .equals("fw") )" endNodeId="N29" endPosition="1" id="L33" name="其他" points="580,1080;580,1800" priority="1" startNodeId="N30" startPosition="3"/> <line endNodeId="N22" endPosition="1" <robotNode content="{"headers":[],"params":[],"formParams":[{"field":"$fdId$","fieldText":"$ID$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"sid","defaultValue":""},{"field":"\"http://scop.shanghai-electric.com/km/review/km_review_main/kmReviewMain.do?method=view&fdId=\"+$fdId$","fieldText":"\"http://scop.shanghai-electric.com/km/review/km_review_main/kmReviewMain.do?method=view&fdId=\"+$ID$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"process_url","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_xfgs$","fieldText":"$开票方$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"gsdm","defaultValue":""},{"field":"return ($fdId$+\"3\").replace($fdId$,\"\");","fieldText":"return ($ID$+\"3\").replace($ID$,\"\");","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"fply","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$receiptType$","fieldText":"$发票类型$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"fplxdm","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$buyerCompanyName$","fieldText":"$企业名称$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"gmfnsrmc","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$buyerTaxNo$","fieldText":"$纳税人识别号$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"gmfnsrsbh","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$remarks$","fieldText":"$发票备注$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"bz","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$detailList$","fieldText":"$明细表1$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"mx","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$jzfwfsd$","fieldText":"$建筑省市区$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"jzfwfsd","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fsdxxdz$","fieldText":"$建筑详细地址$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"fsdxxdz","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$jzxmmc$","fieldText":"$建筑项目$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"jzxmmc","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$kdsbz$","fieldText":"$建筑是否跨地市$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"kdsbz","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fwcqzshm$","fieldText":"$不动产证号$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"fwcqzshm","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$bdcdz$","fieldText":"$不动产省市$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"bdcdz","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$bdcxxdz$","fieldText":"$不动产详细地址$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"bdcxxdz","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$zlkdsbz$","fieldText":"$不动产跨地市$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"zlkdsbz","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$zlqq$","fieldText":"$起始日期$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"zlqq","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$zlqz$","fieldText":"$截止日期$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"zlqz","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$mjdw$","fieldText":"$面积单位$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"mjdw","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$tdzzsxmbh$","fieldText":"$土地增值税编号$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"tdzzsxmbh","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_3cf15e3eca0d60$","fieldText":"$受票方选择$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"gmfgsdm","defaultValue":""}],"responseParams":[{"field":"httpCode","fieldText":"请求code","dataType":"String","fieldName":"code"},{"field":"httpmsg","fieldText":"http返回信息","dataType":"String","fieldName":"msg"}],"restfulUrl":"http://xapi.db.ad01.sec.com/apigateway/SEDTFITOOL/dce-api/sedtfitool-service/pmp/api/invoice_kp/fplr?X-Sec-App-Auth-Key=78fd2d012463b58d3e880645a74015bd","successParam":{"successFieldName":"state","successValue":"200"},"dataFieldName":"oaData"}" id="N16" name="表单数据" unid="*@Robot@restRobotNode" x="380" y="840"/>

<robotNode content="{"headers":[],"params":[],"formParams":[{"field":"$fdId$","fieldText":"$ID$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"sid","defaultValue":""},{"field":"\"http://scop.shanghai-electric.com/km/review/km_review_main/kmReviewMain.do?method=view&fdId=\"+$fdId$","fieldText":"\"http://scop.shanghai-electric.com/km/review/km_review_main/kmReviewMain.do?method=view&fdId=\"+$ID$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"process_url","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_xfgs$","fieldText":"$销方公司$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"gsdm","defaultValue":""},{"field":"return ($fdId$+\"3\").replace($fdId$,\"\");","fieldText":"return ($ID$+\"3\").replace($ID$,\"\");","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"fply","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$流程管理.获取流程表单指定控件的附件$($fdId$,\"fd_files\")","fieldText":"$流程管理.获取流程表单指定控件的附件$($ID$,\"fd_files\")","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"file","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_3cf15e3eca0d60$","fieldText":"$受票方选择$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"gmfgsdm","defaultValue":""}],"responseParams":[{"field":"httpCode","fieldText":"请求code","dataType":"String","fieldName":"code"},{"field":"httpmsg","fieldText":"http返回信息","dataType":"String","fieldName":"msg"}],"restfulUrl":"http://xapi.db.ad01.sec.com/apigateway/SEDTFITOOL/dce-api/sedtfitool-service/pmp/api/invoice_kp/file_import?X-Sec-App-Auth-Key=78fd2d012463b58d3e880645a74015bd","successParam":{"successFieldName":"state","successValue":"200"},"dataFieldName":"oaData"}" id="N8" name="文件数据" unid="*@Robot@restRobotNode" x="560" y="840"/>
